TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Donnie Boyce sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1973, ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 9, Donnie Boyce, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Donnie Boyce mqwas biru maki ilinuoico meut' puluouesuotung gocyu.cyux hopa pqwasan biru praw squliq na p'unro. qnxan na sinsiy 2011 kawas, Boyce t'aring pcbaq seto' maki pqwasan biru . 2015 kawas 10 byacing 19 ryax,Boyce NBA na Texas Legends sinsiy. 2016 kawas 3 byacing, Boyce mtzyaw sinsiy nya maki Proviso East. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *onnie βojʦ~ʨe s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, *onnie βojʦ~ʨe, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) *onnie βojʦ~ʨe mqwas~ɕ βiru maki ilinuoiʦ~ʨo meutʔ puluoues~ɕuotuŋ ɣoʦ~ʨju.ʦ~ʨjux ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru praw s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan na s~ɕins~ɕij **** kawas~ɕ, βojʦ~ʨe tʔariŋ pʦ~ʨβaq s~ɕetoʔ maki pqwas~ɕan βiru . **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,βojʦ~ʨe nβa na texas~ɕ leɣen*s~ɕ s~ɕins~ɕij. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ, βojʦ~ʨe mtzjaw s~ɕins~ɕij nja maki pro*is~ɕo eas~ɕt. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Donnie Boyce sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1973, ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 9, Donnie Boyce, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Donnie Boyce mqwas biru maki ilinuoico meut' puluouesuotung gocyu.cyux hopa pqwasan biru praw squliq na p'unro. qnxan na sinsiy 2011 kawas, Boyce t'aring pcbaq seto' maki pqwasan biru . 2015 kawas 10 byacing 19 ryax,Boyce NBA na Texas Legends sinsiy. 2016 kawas 3 byacing, Boyce mtzyaw sinsiy nya maki Proviso East. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *onnie βojʦ~ʨe s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, *onnie βojʦ~ʨe, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) *onnie βojʦ~ʨe mqwas~ɕ βiru maki ilinuoiʦ~ʨo meutʔ puluoues~ɕuotuŋ ɣoʦ~ʨju.ʦ~ʨjux ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru praw s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan na s~ɕins~ɕij **** kawas~ɕ, βojʦ~ʨe tʔariŋ pʦ~ʨβaq s~ɕetoʔ maki pqwas~ɕan βiru . **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,βojʦ~ʨe nβa na texas~ɕ leɣen*s~ɕ s~ɕins~ɕij. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ, βojʦ~ʨe mtzjaw s~ɕins~ɕij nja maki pro*is~ɕo eas~ɕt. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
